description: VS Code Extension API documentation corpus for SWEObeyMe

categories.name: vscode_api
categories.description: VS Code Extension API reference and overview

documents.title: Extension API | Visual Studio Code Extension API

documents.description: Official VS Code Extension API documentation

integrationStatus.vscode_api: Partial - VS Code extension API documentation downloaded

instructions.addingDocuments: Place resources in appropriate subdirectories. Update this index.json with document metadata including title, author, description, license, topics, and relevance.
instructions.downloadingSources: Download from official VS Code documentation at code.visualstudio.com/api. Prioritize official Microsoft documentation.
instructions.namingConvention: Use clear, descriptive filenames with underscores: api_name.html, guide_name.md
instructions.licenseCompliance: Include license information for all resources. Prioritize official Microsoft documentation.
instructions.vscodeFocus: Resources should enable SWEObeyMe to: (1) understand VS Code Extension API, (2) implement webview functionality correctly, (3) register and handle commands, (4) manage configuration properly, (5) follow VS Code extension best practices.
